hero.title: Software Developer with a strong systems background
hero.description: I design and build well-structured software, focusing on maintainability, performance, and clarity. I enjoy working across the stack, from infrastructure and backend logic to clean, functional interfaces.

intro.title: What I do
intro.text: I work at the intersection of software development and system administration. This allows me to understand not only how applications are written, but also how they run, scale, and fail in real environments.

skillsPreview.title: Core skills
skillsPreview.text: My technical profile combines development and infrastructure, with a strong focus on clean architecture and long-term maintainability.

projectsPreview.title: Selected projects
projectsPreview.text: A small selection of projects where I applied these principles to solve real problems, improve systems, or explore new ideas.

closing.text: If you value well-thought-out systems and clean solutions, you’ll probably feel at home here.
